questions.question: The ‘1776 Commission report’, which was making news recently, is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: The White House has recently released the 1776 Commission report, which was initiated by former US President Donald Trump in September last year.Trump signed an order to set up a National commission to promote patriotic education in the country, also called as the ‘1776 Commission’. This was seen as a counter to 1619 Project, The New York Times initiative, to mark the completion of 400 years since the enslaved Africans arrived.

questions.question: When is the statehood day of the three states of Meghalaya, Manipur & Tripura celebrated?
questions.explanation: Meghalaya, Manipur & Tripura celebrated their 49th statehood day on January 21, 2021.On January 21, 1972, these three states became full-fledged states under the North Eastern Region (Reorganisation) Act of 1971. It also led to the formation of the Union territories of Mizoram and Arunachal Pradesh, which were declared as states on February 21, 1987.

questions.question: The Central Government has approved the construction of over 1.68 lakh houses under which scheme?

options.label: D
options.text: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana National Urban Livelihoods Mission.

questions.explanation: The Indian Government has approved the construction of over 1.68 lakh houses in urban areas under the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana- Urban.As per the Union Housing and Urban Affairs Ministry, the total number of houses sanctioned so far stands at 1.1 crore. Under PMAY-U, 41 lakh houses have been completed so far and over 70 lakh houses are under construction.

questions.question: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) proposed a four-tier regulatory framework for which type of financial institutions?
questions.explanation: Reserve Bank of India recently released a discussion paper on revised regulatory framework for Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs).As per the paper, the regulatory and supervisory framework of NBFCs shall be based on a four-layered structure namely Base Layer, Middle Layer, Upper Layer and a possible Top Layer. RBI also recommended more power for the NBFC Boards on capital and risk management.

questions.question: Which country proposed a five-year extension of New START Treaty with Russia?
questions.explanation: US President Joe Biden has recently proposed a five-year extension of New START Treaty with Russia.The treaty limited the United States and Russia to 1,550 nuclear warheads each. It expires on February 5 this year since the former President Donald Trump stopped negotiations and tried to include China in the treaty.

questions.question: What type of missile is “Akash-NG”, which was test-fired recently?
questions.explanation: The Defence Research Development Organisation (DRDO) has successfully conducted the maiden launch of Akash-NG (New Generation) Missile. It is a New Generation Surface to Air Missile designed to be used in Indian Air Force.It has the capacity to intercept high maneuvering low RCS aerial threats. The test was carried out at the Integrated Test Range off the coast of Odisha.

questions.question: Govind Ballabh Pant, who was seen in the news recently, was the first Chief Minister of which state?
questions.explanation: Freedom fighter and late former Union home minister Govind Ballabh Pant’s statue was relocated from the Parliament complex, as the construction for the new building commenced.The statue was later unveiled in New Delhi’s Pandit Pant Marg. He was also the first Chief Minister of the state of Uttar Pradesh, from 1950 to 1954. He was also awarded with the highest honour of India, the Bharat Ratna.

questions.question: National Non-communicable Disease Monitoring Survey (NNMS), which was released recently, was conducted during which year?
questions.explanation: The Union Health Ministry released the National Non-communicable Disease Monitoring Survey (NNMS).In the survey conducted during 2017-18, it was revealed that two in five adults in India have three or more risk factors for non-communicable diseases (NCD). The Health Minister also launched a framework on use of telemedicine for cancer, diabetes, heart diseases and stroke in India.

questions.question: What is Melatonin?
questions.explanation: A recent research by University of Sao Paulo has revealed that Melatonin hormone secreted in the lungs of human beings act as an effective barrier against Covid-19 infection.It has been identified that the hormone secretion inhibits the expression of genes that are entry points for the virus.

questions.question: Which county has requested for debt restructuring at the IMF, under the new common framework?
questions.explanation: Republic of Chad, a land locked country in North – Central Africa, has requested the International Monetary Fund (IMF) for debt restructuring, under the new common framework. Chad’s request makes it the first country to seek debt restructuring from IMF. Chad has been struggling with high debt burden against a backdrop of the coronavirus crisis.
